title: Unbalanced | OP Structure Loot
description: Unbalanced | OP Structure Loot is a datapack that completely removes progression balance from structure chests.
body:
# Unbalanced | OP Structure Loot

## Description
**Unbalanced | OP Structure Loot** is a Minecraft Java Edition datapack that completely removes progression balance from structure chests. All major structures pull from a single, shared loot table capable of generating enchanted iron, diamond, and netherite gear, enchanted golden apples, and other endgame items right from the start.

Designed for chaotic playthroughs, testing, and modded environments.

## Features
- Overrides loot for major structures (Desert Temples, Bastions, End Cities, Ancient Cities, Strongholds, Shipwrecks, and more)
- Structure chests can generate:
  - Enchanted iron → diamond → netherite armor and tools
  - High-tier enchanted weapons
  - Enchanted Golden Apples
- Centralized loot table for easy modification
- Fully vanilla-compatible datapack
- Compatible with modded servers and clients
- Apotheosis compatible (can roll extremely high-level enchantments)

## Compatibility
- Minecraft Java Edition 1.20.1
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Compatible with Forge and Fabric
- No client-side mods required

## Installation
1. Download the datapack
2. Place `UnbalancedLoot.zip` into:
   .minecraft/saves/<world>/datapacks/
3. Run `/reload`
4. Confirm with `/datapack list`

## Important Notes
- This datapack is intentionally unbalanced
- Early-game structures may grant endgame gear
- Not recommended for vanilla-balanced survival worlds
